content: Motion proposing a national strategy for grid-scale energy storage, instructing the government to set binding capacity targets, review the permitting rules for large battery installations, and report annually to parliament on the progress made. The motion has been referred to the committee on industry and trade for preparation ahead of a chamber vote.

Government bill on amendments to the Electricity Act introducing dynamic network tariffs, clarifying the responsibilities of distribution system operators, and strengthening consumer rights for households with rooftop solar installations. The bill proposes entry into force on the first of January next year following committee review.
Written question to the minister about the opening hours of a regional passport office over the holidays.
Announcement of the parliamentary calendar for the upcoming spring session, listing the chamber debate days.
